sourceRef: tip:A weekly ritual that catches compliance drift

slides.headline: Catch Compliance Drift
slides.body: Stay ahead of compliance issues with a 15-minute weekly ritual.

slides.headline: Weekly Review
slides.body: Start each Friday with a quick review of the week's COE actions.
bullets: Check for any discrepancies or errors.

slides.headline: Form 22-1999
slides.body: Ensure all students are enrolled according to Form 22-1999.
bullets: Look for any discrepancies between enrollment and eligibility.

slides.headline: Compliance Check
slides.body: Conduct a thorough check for compliance with Chapter 33 regulations.
bullets: Verify the correct application of Chapter 33 rules.

slides.headline: Chapter 33
slides.body: Stay updated on the latest Chapter 33 updates and changes.
bullets: Check for any new Chapter 33 requirements.
Review any recent SAA letters or memos.

slides.headline: Communication
slides.body: Communicate with students and staff about compliance issues.
bullets: Inform students of any compliance issues.

outline.caption: Stay ahead of compliance issues with a 15-minute weekly ritual. Start by verifying COE entries, checking Form 22-1999, and ensuring Chapter 33 compliance. Communicate with students and staff about any compliance issues. Start your ritual today.

rubricBreakdown.critique: The 'Weekly Review' slide could benefit from a more concise headline to improve readability and maintain the clean aesthetic.
